title: Whole Cake Island Approach — Chapter 828
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 188 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
key_events: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
